title: Mineral right owner may not compel partition of land
doc_html:
§167.  Mineral right owner may not compel partition of land

The owner of a mineral right acquired from a co-owner of land cannot compel partition of the land.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §167, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§167.  Mineral right owner may not compel partition of land
The owner of a mineral right acquired from a co-owner of land cannot compel partition of the land.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §167, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
